title: nerium indicum f. lutescens
intro: Nerium indicum f. lutescens, also known as the yellow oleander, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, as well as its ability to regulate blood pressure and heart rate. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Nerium indicum f. lutescens is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
